@quotidiania I went. My partner’s first catholic mass, and my first in over 15 years - the first time ever going by choice. I felt really uncomfortable. I was reminded of how I felt like a vector of my parent’s reputation, my obedience to silence and stillness being a measure of my worth.

@quotidiania It was a peaceful experience in itself;  the awareness of community, the devolution of self - ffs even looking in to the distance at a preacher instead of at my phone/naval for an hour was a needed and pleasant bodily experience…

@quotidiania I suppose there has been vital and fascinating realisations in what I observed about obedience etc. - I’ve been enjoying mediating on it… and JC would be please to know it’s fuelling the desire for forgiveness towards my parents and my uncomfortable childhood in general.
